training_status: Trains 5-6 days per week consistently, ~13% body fat
health_conditions: below baseline testosterone as a man

compounds.frequency: twice per week (intended weekly per DAC protocol, split into twice weekly)

side_effects.description: Injection site burned immediately and for a solid day after first injection
Left arm completely numb and tingling the morning after first injection; arms extremely sensitive to numbness and tingling for any activity; ongoing tingling in left arm
Muscles hurting, back hurting, feeling like pulled muscles in legs
Appetite disappeared; forced to eat despite naturally having a massive appetite
Lost sense of confidence and strength felt from testosterone; now just 'exists' with diminished sense of well-being

protocol_notes: OP is naive to peptides and made a dosing error — injected 0.5 mL of CJC1295 w/DAC and 0.3 mL of Ipamorelin, not understanding that volumes must be converted to mcg/mg based on reconstitution. Used 10 mg vials reconstituted with 2 mL bacteriostatic water, meaning approximate doses were 2.5 mg CJC1295 w/DAC and 1.5 mg Ipamorelin per injection. Only administered two injections total before stopping. OP acknowledged the overdose error in an update. Also concurrently on week 7 of a 10-week testosterone cycle at 200 mg/week.
